testcase.name: test_upload_document
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_project_detail.py:201: in test_upload_document assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to upload document: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to upload document: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_note_to_document
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_project_detail.py:227: in test_add_note_to_document doc_id = upload_resp.json()["document_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'document_id'

testcase.name: test_download_document
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_project_detail.py:259: in test_download_document doc_id = upload_resp.json()["document_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'document_id'

testcase.name: test_delete_document
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_project_detail.py:281: in test_delete_document doc_id = upload_resp.json()["document_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'document_id'

testcase.name: test_upload_document_nonexistent_preproject
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pre_project_detail.py:467: in test_upload_document_nonexistent_preproject assert response.status_code == 404 E assert 422 == 404 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
